name: Doctor Sarria
description:
The war doctor turned school teacher. And perhaps..he's working towards a greater destiny. Don't look at his cell-stone, there's an annoying god of invention who likes to text him.

A Phox Pantheon affiliated NPC from my world AIRA. (Please do not use my characters or my world for your homebrews, and no reposting onto other platforms.)
creator: dr.scourge
